examples: In our own species, limbic damage is closely related to sociopathic behaviour.
Anticipating a better grade on the following morning exam, a student can ignore the limbic urge to socialise and go to sleep early instead.
Unique to mammals, the limbic cortex impels creatures to nurture their offspring by delivering feelings of tenderness and warmth to the parent when children are nearby.
"The joke is that we're the real angry bird, " Limbic Chief Executive Arash Keshmirian says.
Ten million copies of Limbic's games have been downloaded via the iPhone's App Store, Keshmirian says.
